name: Gather for Doors Open at Spadina Museum
description: Spadina Museum tells the stories of the affluent Austin family, those who worked in their service, and of the transformational changes in Toronto in the 1920s. At Spadina Museum  visitors are invited to engage with the site at their own pace and to bring their questions and curiosity. This year's theme for Doors Open is The World in a City and at Spadina Museum visitors will find elements of gathering, sports and play throughout, exploring the sports, games and leisure activities enjoyed in the 1920s. Visitors are invited to enjoy the 6 acres of lush gardens surrounding the home.

name: Saturday Farmers' Market
description: Visit the Saturday Farmers' Market in the newly redeveloped St. Lawrence Market North building. Discover seasonal produce, baked goods, meats, cheeses, flowers and pantry staples from local vendors all under one roof.
